title: isodon henryi
intro: Isodon henryi, also known as the Henry's isodon or Chinese golden herb, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Isodon henryi include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Isodon henryi is often dried and used as an infusion, or combined with other herbs in teas, soups, and tonics to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
